name: Hot Mocha Pudding
recipeInstructions:
TOPPING:
1/2 cup sugar
1 teaspoon instant coffee
2 tablespoons cocoa
1 1/2 cups hot water
Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Add beaten egg and vanilla, mix well.
Sift flour, baking powder, cocoa, and instant coffee into a separate bowl.
Add to the creamed mixture alternately with milk.
Pour the mixture into an 8-inch ovenproof dish.
TO PREPARE TOPPING:
Mix together sugar, instant coffee, and cocoa in another bowl.
Sprinkle over the pudding.
Carefully pour hot water over the pudding.
Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes. Serve hot.
